functions.description: Toggles deactivation of a managed-type veNFT. Can target any managed NFT. Has no effect on AERO balances — users retain full withdrawManaged() rights at any time. Blocks new deposits into the deactivated mNFT and voting by users currently parked in it; both resolvable by withdrawing.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Does not touch already-committed funds: withdrawManaged() remains available, so users can always reclaim their locked AERO. The effect is limited to blocking new deposits into the deactivated managed NFT and preventing voting by users currently parked in it.

functions.description: One-time init, already called. Sets whitelisted tokens and minter address.
Changes governor address. Pure access-control swap, no fund flows depend on it.
Changes epochGovernor address. Only read as access control for Minter.nudge().
Changes emergencyCouncil address. Pure access-control swap for killGauge/reviveGauge.
Changes max pools per vote. Only read in vote(), doesn't affect existing votes or rewards.
Toggles token whitelist for gauge creation. Doesn't affect existing gauges or funds.
Toggles late-voting privilege for a veNFT. No effect on accrued rewards or positions.
Kills a gauge: sets isAlive=false and claws back undistributed claimable rewards to minter. LPs in the gauge lose pending epoch rewards. Already-distributed rewards inside the gauge are unaffected.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Users can always withdraw their LP NFTs from a killed gauge (withdraw() has no isAlive check) and claim rewards already accrued on the pool side. Only blocks new deposits and returns unclaimed voter-side emissions for the current epoch back to the minter (which re-enter next week's weekly). No LP principal is at risk.

functions.description: Re-enables a killed gauge for future voting and distribution. Does not restore clawed-back rewards.
Adds new AERO emissions to global index. Only allocates new tokens proportionally; existing distributed rewards unaffected.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Pausing blocks only Pool.swap(); existing LPs can still burn() their liquidity positions at any time. Effect is limited to halting future swaps.
Default stable/volatile swap fee capped at MAX_FEE (3%) and must be > 0. Caller cannot tax swaps above 3%.
Per-pool base swap fee capped at MAX_FEE (3%). 420 = sentinel for explicit 0%. Caller cannot tax swaps above 3%.

functions.description: already initialized
Allows to change the ownership.
Concludes the of ownership.
Changes the emission rate for the team.

mitigations.description: Team emission rate capped at MAXIMUM_TEAM_RATE (500 bps = 5% of weekly emissions). Caller cannot redirect more than 5% of weekly mint to the team.

functions.description: This function allows to change the tail emission by 1bps per week.

mitigations.description: Tail emission rate can change by at most 1 bps per call.
Rate limited to once per epoch (1 week).

functions.description: A permissionless function that allows anyone to mint the weekly emissions and transfer it to the team, rewardsDistributor and voter contract.

mitigations.description: Rate limited to once per week (epoch).
Weekly emission amount is formula-driven (weekly * WEEKLY_DECAY/GROWTH during schedule, or totalSupply * tailEmissionRate / MAX_BPS after TAIL_START). Caller cannot mint an arbitrary amount.
Base fee cannot exceed MAX_BASE_FEE (3%) or must be ZERO_FEE_INDICATOR
Scaling factor cannot exceed MAX_SCALING_FACTOR (1e18)
Default fee cap cannot exceed MAX_FEE_CAP (5%)
Scaling factor cannot exceed MAX_SCALING_FACTOR (1e18).
Fee cap must be > 0 and cannot exceed MAX_FEE_CAP (5%)
TWAP lookback must be >= MIN_SECONDS_AGO (2s) and < MAX_SECONDS_AGO (131070s)
Discount cannot exceed MAX_DISCOUNT (50%)
Per-pool unstaked-fee redirect capped at MAX_FEE (500000 / 1000000 = 50%). 420 = sentinel for explicit 0%. Caller cannot redirect more than 50% of newly-accrued swap fees from unstaked to staked LPs.
onlyGauge callback — not callable by humans or admins. Invoked by the CLGauge contract during user deposit/withdraw to update the pool's staked-liquidity accounting. No fund-movement path.
onlyGauge callback — ticks the reward accumulator; cannot transfer tokens. Invoked by the CLGauge contract during regular user interactions.
onlyGauge callback — invoked by the CLGauge contract after notifyRewardAmount (itself driven by Voter) to set the next epoch's reward schedule on the pool. Not an admin lever.
onlyGauge callback — transfers only the accumulated gaugeFees storage balance (fees levied on unstaked liquidity) to the CLGauge for distribution to staked LPs. Cannot extract LP reserves.

functions.description: New administrator that will be able to call `notifyRewardWithoutClaim` on gauges.
Only callable once
Sets the emission cap for a Gauge

mitigations.description: Emission cap cannot exceed MAX_BPS (10000 bps)

functions.description: Sets the default emission cap for the gauge.

mitigations.description: Default cap must be between 1 and MAX_BPS (10000)

comments.author: yvesboutellier
comments.text: admins are just to bypass additional whitelist checks

functions.description: Changes the owner of the contract.
The new `swapFeeManager` can update the swapFeeModule.
unstakedFeeManager can set defaultUnstakedFee and unstakedFeeModule.
Sets the fee module which is queried by pools. The getSwapFee function enforces the mitigation. It cannot be higher than 1000bps (10%).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Swaps in the module used to split newly-accrued swap fees. Existing LP principal and already-collected fees are unaffected.

functions.description: Sets the amount of the collected fees that are redistributed from unstaked to staked LPs (staked in Gauges).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only the split of future swap fees between unstaked LPs and gauges (staked LPs). Existing LP principal is unaffected.
Unstaked-fee share capped at 50% (500000 bps). Caller cannot redirect more than half of future swap fees.

functions.description: Allow new tick spacing.

mitigations.description: Default fee for the new tick spacing must be > 0 and capped at 10% (100000 / 1000000). Only applies to future pools created with this tick spacing.

functions.description: Changes the owner of the contract.
The new `swapFeeManager` can update the swapFeeModule.
unstakedFeeManager can set defaultUnstakedFee and unstakedFeeModule.
Sets the fee module which is queried by pools. The getSwapFee function enforces the mitigation. It cannot be higher than 1000bps (10%).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Swaps in the module used to split newly-accrued swap fees. Existing LP principal and already-collected fees are unaffected.

functions.description: Sets the amount of the collected fees that are redistributed from unstaked to staked LPs (staked in Gauges).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only the split of future swap fees between unstaked LPs and gauges (staked LPs). Existing LP principal is unaffected.
Unstaked-fee share capped at 50% (500000 bps). Caller cannot redirect more than half of future swap fees.

functions.description: Allow new tick spacing.

mitigations.description: Default fee for the new tick spacing must be > 0 and capped at 10% (100000 / 1000000). Only applies to future pools created with this tick spacing.

functions.description: Sets a custom fee for a specific pool.

mitigations.description: Per-pool custom swap fee capped at factory MAX_FEE. Caller cannot tax swaps above this cap.

functions.description: This function was executd once, Minter contract does not have any function to call this and is the only allowed caller.
Mitigations on minting amount are on the Minter contract.

Records the outcome of the current epoch's tail-rate nudge vote (Expired / Succeeded / Defeated). The result is only read by Minter.nudge(), which adjusts tailEmissionRate by ±1 bps per epoch within the [MINIMUM_TAIL_RATE, MAXIMUM_TAIL_RATE] band. Only affects next-epoch emissions — never touches existing AERO balances.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Does not touch already-minted AERO. Affects only the next epoch's tail emission rate via Minter.nudge(), capped at ±1 bps per epoch and bounded by MINIMUM_TAIL_RATE / MAXIMUM_TAIL_RATE on Minter.

functions.description: Changes the owner of the contract.
The new `swapFeeManager` can update the swapFeeModule.
unstakedFeeManager can set defaultUnstakedFee and unstakedFeeModule.
Sets the fee module which is queried by pools. The getSwapFee function enforces the mitigation. It cannot be higher than 1000bps (10%).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Swaps in the module used to split newly-accrued swap fees. Existing LP principal and already-collected fees are unaffected.

functions.description: Sets the amount of the collected fees that are redistributed from unstaked to staked LPs (staked in Gauges).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only the split of future swap fees between unstaked LPs and gauges (staked LPs). Existing LP principal is unaffected.
Unstaked-fee share capped at 50% (500000 bps). Caller cannot redirect more than half of future swap fees.

functions.description: Allow new tick spacing.

mitigations.description: Default fee for the new tick spacing must be > 0 and capped at 10% (100000 / 1000000). Only applies to future pools created with this tick spacing.
The per-gauge emission cap is expressed in basis points and capped at 100% (10,000 bps = MAX_BPS).

functions.description: Sets the redistributor address that receives over-cap emissions excess from CLGauges. Only affects future voter distributions (the excess portion when a gauge's voted emissions exceed its per-epoch cap) — no path to existing AERO balances. The redistributor also gains the right to call notifyRewardWithoutClaim on CLGauges, but that function pulls tokens from msg.sender and can only add (not drain) rewards.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Only routes future over-cap emission excess from CLGauges; cannot touch already-committed AERO in gauges, VotingEscrow, or user wallets. The redistributor's notifyRewardWithoutClaim access pulls tokens from the caller and can only add rewards, not drain them.

mitigations.label: not VE team
mitigations.description: The redistributor cannot equal the current VotingEscrow team or the legacy gauge factory's notifyAdmin — those permissions must be transferred out first.
The default emission cap must be non-zero and is capped at 100% (10,000 bps = MAX_BPS).
The default minimum stake time before penalty-free unstake/claim is bounded at 1 week (MAX_MIN_STAKE_TIME).
The per-pool minimum stake time before penalty-free unstake/claim is bounded at 1 week (MAX_MIN_STAKE_TIME).
The early-unstake penalty rate is capped at 100% (10,000 bps = MAX_BPS). A 100% rate would zero out rewards claimed before the minimum stake time elapses.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Only affects how newly-accrued swap fees are split between unstaked LPs and gauges (staked LPs). Existing LP principal and already-collected fees are not touched.
Per-pool unstaked-fee share capped at 50% (500000 / 1000000). Caller cannot redirect more than half of future swap fees.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Per-pool base fee capped at 3% (30000 / 1000000). 420 = sentinel for explicit 0%.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Default scaling factor K (dynamic-fee sensitivity to volatility) capped at 1e18.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Default fee cap itself capped at 5% (50000 / 1000000).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Per-pool scaling factor K capped at 1e18. A fee cap must be set first.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Per-pool maximum total fee cap must be non-zero and capped at 5% (50000 / 1000000).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
TWAP window bounded between 2 seconds and 131068 seconds (~36.4 hours).

mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.
Per-address fee discount capped at 50% (500000 / 1000000).

mitigations.description: Changes only affect swap fees charged on future swaps; LP principal is unaffected.

Every fee in the bulk update capped at 3% (30000 / 1000000), matching setCustomFee.
